title: Welcome to Dental Experts: Multi Speciality Dental Care Centre based in Mumbai
heading: MEET THE
description: DENTAL EXPERTS is a specialized centre for cosmetic dentistry setup by Dr Rakesh Mehta and Dr Nidhi Mehta. We offer solutions for a wide range of dental problems. At dental experts you can be assured of quality dentistry, comfort and pain free dental experience. We always provide a customized treatment plan to our patients according to their needs. Our dental treatment include: dental implants, single sitting root canals, paediatric dentistry, orthodontics, geriatric dentistry, cosmetic dentistry using dental laminates and veneers, tooth whitening and much more. We have in house OPG facility to improve your experience.
